implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Efficiency objective for Library: , maximum number of books per member) and track overdue books
The system shall ensure efficiency (throughput stability): Members must be able to search for books by title, author, or ISBN
The system shall ensure responsibility (ethical compliance): A library management system must allow library members to borrow and return books
The system shall ensure safety (fault tolerance): The system must track which books are available, which are borrowed, and by whom
The system shall ensure sustainability (energy footprint reduction): Librarians must be able to add new books, remove books, and manage member accounts
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (security assurance): A library management system must allow library members to borrow and return books
The system shall ensure trustworthiness (integrity guarantees): Librarians must be able to add new books, remove books, and manage member accounts
